items.name: Fortnite Kit Shoulder Pal: Cute Cat Companion
items.description:
Join the group for more: https://www.roblox.com/communities/785914221/Doom-Creations#!/about

Bring a locked‑in gamer cat to every match with this shoulder pal. This tiny feline perches on your avatar’s shoulder like a loyal sidekick, always ready to queue, grind, and clutch the win. Its soft white colors pop in lobbies, screenshots, and edits, while the simple, chunky style fits almost any outfit. Perfect for competitive players, casual hangouts, and UGC collectors who want a clean, cute accessory that still feels sweaty and focused.
